title: eleutheranthera ruderalis var. radiata
intro: Eleutheranthera ruderalis var. radiata, also known as Xiang Fu, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Xiang Fu has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it effective in treating conditions such as abdominal pain, digestive issues, and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Xiang Fu include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. Xiang Fu is commonly prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal and therapeutic purposes.
